decision: KEEP as informative missing — business logic. Missing only when incident_type is Vehicle Theft / Parked Car, where a collision_type genuinely does not apply. Will be encoded as its own "Not Applicable" category in Section 4, not imputed.
IMPUTE with mode. Missingness shows no significant fraud-rate difference (see diff values printed above) — safe to fill with the most frequent category rather than drop or flag.
IMPUTE with mode. Same reasoning as property_damage — missingness is not informative of fraud, so mode imputation introduces minimal bias.
